extract: Ampharos (Japanese: デンリュウ Denryu) is an Electric-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Flaaffy starting at level 30. It is the final form of Mareep. Ampharos can Mega Evolve into Mega Ampharos using the Ampharosite. Ampharos was officially revealed in the May 1997 issue of CoroCoro, along with Donphan and Slowking.
